title: Default-Style Christmas Pack
description: A Christmas Themed revamp of the Default Experience!
body:
![Christmas Pack Logo](https://i.imgur.com/vItENDR.png) --- This resource pack fills your world with Christmas cheer, while maintaining the default style. If you want the Winter vibes minus Christmas, try the **[Winter Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-style-winter-pack)**! **[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), and [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (or Optifine) RECOMMENDED!**

OPTIFINE STRONGLY RECOMMENDED!

**What's Inside**: - Festive Lights on Spruce trees and replacing Iron Bars - Gingerbread Cookies and Candy Cane Sugar Cane - Adorable [Cozy Bees](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cozy-bees) & Gingerbread Creepers by Kobro(https://modrinth.com/user/Kobro) - Wintery Environment (similar to Winter Pack) - Placeable Snowmen Replace Peonies - Candy Cane GUI *Note: this is a continuation of my 1.11 pack that can be found [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/default-style-christmas-pack).* [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/I3I410P9Q1) ![Images Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/4UV0z4K.png) ![Decorations](https://i.imgur.com/4z8Frx1.png) ![Interior](https://i.imgur.com/B9EYYFG.png) ![Spruce](https://i.imgur.com/U9zTjB5.png) ![Bank](https://i.imgur.com/mEneV0u.png) ![Pairings Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/rGi1bap.png) Some resource packs and client-side mods that pair nicely with this resource pack! - [Resource Pack] 🎅 [Wearable Christmas Hats](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/wearable-christmas-hats): changes the pumpkin model to be a Santa hat - [Mod] [Fabric] ❄️ [Soft Weather](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/soft-weather): makes snow (and rain) much nicer to look at.
